tier_5_temple.name: Temple Relics
tier_5_temple.desc: 9 Cards · Elite · Max 3000 ATK · No Ultra Rare

campaign.story_intro_1: The Han Dynasty crumbles. Warlords carve the empire into warring kingdoms, and the people suffer under endless war.
campaign.story_intro_2: Yet amidst the chaos, a different kind of battle has emerged — one fought not with swords, but with cards of power.
campaign.story_intro_3: Oh, a new face at the imperial court! I am Pang Tong. Tell me — do you know the way of duel cards?
campaign.story_intro_4: Each card holds the spirit of a warrior, a beast, or a spell. Master them, and you master the battlefield itself.
campaign.story_intro_5: Take this starter deck. Prove your worth against the court's duelists, and perhaps you will earn a place in the grand tournament.
campaign.duel_7_post_1: Impressive. You actually managed to defeat me. Don't let it go to your head — I wasn't even trying.
campaign.duel_7_post_2: But mark my words: the next time we meet, I will crush you without mercy. The Wei clan does not lose twice.
campaign.duel_7_post_3: Cao Pi left with a cold smile. His ambition was unmistakable — this rivalry was far from over.
campaign.duel_8_post_1: The Yellow Sky watches over all. You fought well, child, yet the heavens cannot be moved by mortal strength alone.
campaign.duel_8_post_2: Zhang Jue's sorcery proved too powerful. The cards scattered like leaves in a storm.
campaign.duel_8_post_3: A blinding light engulfed the arena. When it faded, the world around you had... changed.
campaign.duel_8_post_4: The imperial court was gone. In its place stood an unknown land — the past, or perhaps something even stranger.
campaign.story_arrival_1: After days of wandering, you reached a great walled city. Banners of every color hung from its towers.
campaign.story_arrival_2: This was the legendary Tournament of the Three Kingdoms — where the greatest duelists from all lands gathered.
campaign.story_arrival_3: The prize: a set of cards said to hold the power of the ancient Five Elements.
campaign.story_arrival_4: To claim them, you would need to fight through qualifiers, quarterfinals, semifinals, and a grand finale.
campaign.story_arrival_5: You entered your name and stepped into the arena. The crowd roared. The tournament had begun.
campaign.duel_17_post_1: The final card hit the field, and the crowd erupted in cheers. Against all odds, you had won the tournament.
campaign.duel_17_post_2: The Five Elements cards were yours. Yet as you held them, a strange energy pulsed through your fingertips.
campaign.duel_17_post_3: Something awakened — something ancient and powerful. The cards seemed to call you to a distant place.
campaign.story_return_1: Guided by the pull of the Five Elements cards, you traveled deep into the wilderness beyond the city walls.
campaign.story_return_2: Familiar faces appeared along the way — old rivals seeking a rematch, and new enemies drawn by your growing fame.
campaign.story_return_3: The cards pulsed stronger with each step. Whatever lay ahead — there was no turning back.
campaign.story_return_4: At last, you stood before a massive stone gate, adorned with the symbols of Water, Wood, Earth, Metal, and Fire.
campaign.duel_31_pre_1: You dare enter my domain? I am Mi Hun — I am the labyrinth, and the labyrinth is me.
campaign.duel_31_pre_2: Every soul that wanders these halls feeds my power. Your Five Elements cards summoned you here — but they will not save you.
campaign.duel_31_pre_3: Then come, mortal. Let us see if your cards can unravel what your mind cannot.
campaign.duel_31_post_1: The labyrinth trembled and began to collapse. Mi Hun's form dissolved into mist, with one final, echoing whisper.
campaign.duel_31_post_2: As the walls crumbled, a hidden passage was revealed — deeper underground, toward a faint, ominous glow.
campaign.story_betrayal_1: You stepped out of the labyrinth into daylight, only to see a familiar figure waiting at the exit.
campaign.story_betrayal_2: Surprised? You shouldn't be. I've been tracking your progress since the tournament. Those Five Elements cards — I need them.
campaign.story_betrayal_3: My father demands power, and I will bring it to him. Hand over the cards, or I will take them by force.
campaign.story_betrayal_4: Did you really believe we were rivals? No — you were just a pawn, sent to gather what I could not reach alone.
campaign.story_betrayal_5: Cao Pi drew his deck. There would be no negotiation. Only battle.
campaign.duel_32_post_1: Cao Pi stumbled back, his cards scattered across the ground. Defeat was written on his face.
campaign.duel_32_post_2: This... this changes nothing. My father will still get what he wants. You have no idea what's coming for you.
campaign.duel_32_post_3: He vanished into the shadows. His words lingered — who was the true enemy pulling the strings from behind?
campaign.duel_35_post_1: Zhang Jue sank to his knees, his mystical aura flickering and fading like a dying flame.
campaign.duel_35_post_2: You have grown strong... yet I was never the true threat. The one who summoned me — he still lurks in the shadows.
campaign.duel_35_post_3: Before you could question him further, a dark portal tore open behind the fallen sorcerer. Something immense stirred within.
campaign.story_alliance_1: To your surprise, Cao Pi appeared at the edge of the battlefield — not as an enemy, but with an outstretched hand.
campaign.story_alliance_2: I know what you're thinking. But my father has gone too far. He plans to unleash Lu Bu — the war demon himself.
campaign.story_alliance_3: Neither of us can stop him alone. For now — let us join forces. When this is over... we shall see.
campaign.story_alliance_4: An uneasy alliance was forged. Together, you pressed forward into the heart of the gathering storm.
campaign.duel_37_post_1: Lu Bu let out a thunderous roar as he fell. Yet the ground beneath you began to shake violently.
campaign.duel_37_post_2: The warrior's body erupted in crimson light. When it faded, Lu Bu stood once more — riding the legendary Red Hare.
campaign.duel_38_post_1: At last, Lu Bu collapsed for good. The Red Hare dissolved into embers carried away by the wind.
campaign.duel_38_post_2: Yet from the shadows behind the fallen warrior, a slow, deliberate clapping echoed across the battlefield.
campaign.duel_38_post_3: Well played, both of you. But every piece on this board moved exactly as I intended. Now — let me show you the deck of a true master.
campaign.duel_39_post_1: Cao Cao's final card shattered. The mastermind stared in disbelief at his empty hand, then began to laugh.
campaign.duel_39_post_2: The Five Elements cards blazed with brilliant light, and the dark energy that had torn the world apart began to recede.
campaign.duel_39_post_3: The sky cleared. The land healed. The echoes of the Three Kingdoms faded into gentle silence.
campaign.duel_39_post_4: Your journey was over — yet the cards remained, humming softly, as if waiting for the next great duelist.
